posts.text:
The Cuban Regime is a brutal, murderous, Communist dictatorship that has destroyed the liberty of the Cuban people for generations.

It is a national security threat just 90 mi away that has terrorized the families of nearly 1.6M Floridians for nearly 70 yrs.

The Regime must go.

Video

FACT: 83% of Americans support voter-ID.

FACT: 79% of Americans oppose men in women’s sports.

FACT: 72% of Americans oppose transgender surgeries for minors.

This is @Eric_Schmitt’s Amendment to the “Save America Act.”

This is widely popular & common sense.

This should pass.

Video

Florida has grown incredibly fast over the past 6 years.

Our infrastructure needs to catch-up.

Under my leadership, we will implement regional planning across our state to increase efficiency, expedite permitting, complete much-needed infrastructure projects and reduce traffic.

Video

.@SusieWiles is a dear friend, an incredible White House Chief of Staff, and the embodiment of a fighter.

Erika and I pray for her strength, health, and quick recovery.

As she undergoes treatment, I have no doubt that she will continue to fight on behalf of the American people.


Rapid Response 47 (@RapidResponse47)







— https://nitter.net/RapidResponse47/status/2033573681973133389#m
23 years and counting! Happy Anniversary @ErikaDonalds! I love you and the life we have built together.

✅US beats Canada in Stanley Cup
✅US beats Canada in World Series
✅US beats Canada for Women's Hockey Gold
✅US beats Canada for Men's Hockey Gold
✅US beats Canada in World Baseball Classic
✅US beats Canada for Paralympics Hockey Gold

The dynasty continues–PLAY FREE BIRD🇺🇸🦅


NBC Olympics & Paralympics (@NBCOlympics)

The dynasty continues. 🥇

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/NBCOlympics/status/2033232893955260618#m

You cannot negotiate with crazy & that’s exactly what the Democrats have become.

The Democrats need to get real—defunding critical national security & disaster relief is not some political game or campaign slogan.

The Senate must put the AMERICAN PEOPLE FIRST & FUND @DHSgov.

Video

I’m a FREE SPEECH ABSOLUTIST.

If you want to be an asshat—you’re allowed to be an asshat, and I’ll protect your right to be one.

If you want to be ignorant—you’re allowed to be ignorant, and I’ll protect your right to be ignorant.

This is the very essence of Constitutionalism.

Video

There is right and there is wrong.

Will we stand-up and oppose the rise of bigotry and anti-Semitism in our country?

MY ANSWER IS CLEAR: 100% YES.

This is about standing-up to ignorance.
This is about establishing moral clarity.
This is about real leadership.

Video

Florida has been on one of the hottest 30 year runs of any state in the nation, and the last 7 years have been epic.

We CANNOT rest on our laurels.

With unapologetic conservatism, we’ll continue to lead the way, build upon our successes, and plan for Florida’s next 30 year run.

Video

The release of 51 prisoners in Cuba is only possible because President Trump’s strong leadership is putting real pressure on the dictatorship.

We cannot let up until every political prisoner is free and the Cuban people live in liberty.

miamiherald.com/news/nation-…

Thank you to everyone who joined us at The Griddle in Boca Raton.

Together, we will keep our state THE FREE STATE OF FLORIDA☀️🇺🇸

Video

When disaster strikes, time is of the essence.

This isn't just a Florida issue.
This is nationwide.

I'm proud that my bill, HR 5103—“The FISHES Act” was signed into law by the President.

HR 5103 expedites disbursement of fishery disaster relief to coastal communities in need.

Video

Democratic Socialists have seized control of the Democrat Party and are pushing a radical Communist agenda.

These leftists even supported kids being taken from their parents to be transitioned.

They lack credibility.
They lack common sense.
They have NO BUSINESS holding power.

Video

Tim Walz was told what was going on and he LET IT HAPPEN.

Taxpayer dollars flowed through the State of MN, to fraudsters, and back to Somalia through the Hawala network.

Al-Shabaab—Somalia’s Al Qaeda affiliate is deeply embedded in this network.

There need to be consequences.

Video
